title: HG Deep Cleaner for Leather, Leather Cleaner & Faux Leather Cleaner, Safe & Mild for Coloured Leather, Water Based Bag, Boot, Jacket & Leather Sofa Cleaning Liquid - 250ml
features: HG Deep Cleaner for Leather: A gentle real leather and PU leather cleaner, safe to use for cleaning full aniline and coloured leather furniture, upholstery, clothing and accessories
Effective multi purpose cleaner for leather: Ideal for cleaning sofas, armchairs, leather boots, bags, suitcases, footstools, car seats and more. Won't damage delicate leather surfaces
Cleans deep in the pores: Actively deep cleans leather surfaces deep down into the pores. The ideal base for HG's 4-in-1 Leather Cleaner and polish. Not suitable for use on suede or nubuck
Easy to use stain remover for leather: Simply apply with a cloth, wipe over the surface and let the fluid work its magic for a few seconds before rubbing away and removing any loosened dirt
Includes: 1 x HG Deep Cleaner for Leather, 250ml. Discover the range of HG professional household cleaning products, including HG mould remover spray, multi purpose cleaners and all surface cleaners
description: Product Description HG Deep Cleaner for Leather is a mild water-based leather cleaner which is perfect for cleaning deep in the pores of full aniline and coloured types of leather, such as leather furniture, car upholstery leather, luggage, leather jackets, saddles, accessories, boots and bags. Use this deep cleaner and leather stain remover to clean delicate leather and faux leather surfaces safely and mildly. It’s the perfect basis for treatment before using HG 4-in-1 Leather Cleaner.  Discover HG professional's wide range of specialist multi surface cleaner products and all purpose cleaner sprays for your home, office and outside space. Includes: 1 x HG Deep Cleaner for Leather, 250ml (173030106) Instructions: 1. Shake well before use. Perform a patch test first. 2. Dampen a clean, soft cloth with HG leather cleaner. 3. Clean the surface area using circular motions without any pressure. For stains, let the deep cleaner work for 10-30 seconds, then wipe away loosened dirt with a clean cloth. Take a clean cloth regularly when cleaning large surfaces. For an effective leather cleaning kit, add an HG cloth and HG's 4-in-1 Leather Cleaner (sold separately). Not suitable for suede or nubuck surfaces. Keep out of reach/sight of children. Always read the label. Box Contains 1 x HG Deep cleaner for leather 0.25L
